name: exPDite-2 bemdaneprocel Parkinson disease phase 3 trial
summary: A recruiting randomized, triple-masked, sham-surgery-controlled phase 3 trial testing bemdaneprocel in adults with Parkinson disease.
population: Adults with Parkinson disease eligible for sham-surgery-controlled dopaminergic neuronal cell therapy testing

trial_details.expected_results_window: Primary completion is estimated for March 2027 and study completion for March 2032; no near-term posted efficacy result should be assumed before primary data mature.
trial_details.horizon_note: The phase 3 Parkinson disease trial remains recruiting with no posted ClinicalTrials.gov results as of the June 14, 2026 check.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Stem Cell Replacement and Transplantation because they can show whether bemdaneprocel changes function and safety in adults with Parkinson disease under sham-surgery-controlled conditions. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
